Beginner.text: Event type: Pass Blue FC are set in a 4-3-3, with support on both sides of the ball, and keep a balanced shape. In simple terms, that means the team keeps support on both sides of the ball. The opposition defend in a compact balanced mid block. The opposition shape protects the central lane and slows central progression.

Intermediate.text: Event type: Pass Blue FC are set in a 4-3-3, through a balanced attacking pattern, and keep a balanced shape. The opposition defend in a compact balanced mid block. The opposition shape protects the central lane and slows central progression. There is immediate support around the ball and a wider outlet is available.

Expert.text: Event type: Pass Blue FC settle in a 4-3-3, through a balanced attacking pattern, and maintain a balanced shape. The opposition defend in a compact balanced mid block. The opposition shape protects the central lane and slows central progression. There is immediate support around the ball and a wider outlet is available.
